title: Cristiano Ronaldo Inspired Luxury Sportswear Campaign AI
sourceTitle: Cristiano Ronaldo Inspired Luxury Sportswear Campaign AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Luxury sports fashion campaign inspired by Cristiano Ronaldo, featuring Cristiano Ronaldo inspired football icon standing confidently with hands behind back in black Portugal national team jersey with a bold red textured vertical stripe inside a minimalist high-fashion football studio. Subject: Cristiano Ronaldo inspired football icon standing confidently with hands behind back holds a serious confident expression with athletic physique, realistic skin texture, sharp focus, premium football lifestyle presence, and modern luxury athlete branding. Scene: minimalist beige studio for a premium football lifestyle campaign uses a clean neutral beige studio, muted earth tones, soft cinematic lighting, negative space, and a commercial sportswear campaign atmosphere. Composition: Editorial shot system with full-body standing portrait, close-up chest detail, seated black designer-chair portrait, and product display shot; centered full-body portrait, chest-detail crop, seated designer-chair portrait, and jersey draped over a chair with matching tracksuit and sneakers as a luxury catalog extension. Signature Elements: Preserved cristiano ronaldo inspired luxury sportswear campaign source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-fashion sportswear photography with Nike-inspired campaign energy, Vogue Men and GQ Sports editorial polish, 85mm shallow depth of field, photorealistic 8K detail, and commercial advertising quality. Color Palette: Muted earth-tone beige studio palette, black Portugal jersey base, bold red textured vertical stripe, subtle silver jewelry highlights, neutral skin tones, and restrained premium branding colors. Lighting: Soft cinematic studio lighting, clean frontal key, gentle shadow falloff, controlled fabric highlights, and polished magazine-cover exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Cristiano Ronaldo Inspired Luxury Sportswear Campaign Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Luxury sports fashion campaign inspired by Cristiano Ronaldo, featuring elite number-seven Portugal forward with serious magazine-cover presence in black modern football jersey, silver chain, tailored tracksuit pieces, and luxury sneakers inside a minimalist high-fashion football studio. Subject: elite number-seven Portugal forward with serious magazine-cover presence holds a serious confident expression with athletic physique, realistic skin texture, sharp focus, premium football lifestyle presence, and modern luxury athlete branding. Scene: clean neutral studio for a Nike-inspired luxury athlete campaign uses a clean neutral beige studio, muted earth tones, soft cinematic lighting, negative space, and a commercial sportswear campaign atmosphere. Composition: Editorial shot system with centered hero portrait, jersey texture macro, seated editorial pose, and catalog still life; centered full-body portrait, chest-detail crop, seated designer-chair portrait, and folded jersey, sneakers, and accessories arranged as a premium sports catalog set as a luxury catalog extension. Signature Elements: Preserved cristiano ronaldo inspired luxury sportswear campaign source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-fashion sportswear photography with Nike-inspired campaign energy, Vogue Men and GQ Sports editorial polish, 85mm shallow depth of field, photorealistic 8K detail, and commercial advertising quality. Color Palette: Muted earth-tone beige studio palette, black Portugal jersey base, bold red textured vertical stripe, subtle silver jewelry highlights, neutral skin tones, and restrained premium branding colors. Lighting: Soft cinematic studio lighting, clean frontal key, gentle shadow falloff, controlled fabric highlights, and polished magazine-cover exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
